query:
SELECT
                id,
                step,
                tried
            FROM pg_task
            WHERE error IS NULL
              AND (
                CASE
                    WHEN locked_by IS NOT NULL THEN
                        GREATEST(wakeup_at, lock_expires_at)
                    ELSE
                        wakeup_at
                END
              ) <= now()
            ORDER BY
                CASE
                    WHEN locked_by IS NOT NULL THEN
                        GREATEST(wakeup_at, lock_expires_at)
                    ELSE
                        wakeup_at
                END
            LIMIT 1
            FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
